title: Command Cockpit Mobile HUD Strip
summary: Compressed the selected-lane HUD into a mobile-first status strip inside the Command Cockpit so the first narrow viewport shows lane identity, signal cells, and bot presence without clipping the mission console below.
proof: Added a Command Cockpit-only mobile marker and README unlock entry.
Scoped mobile HUD CSS to smaller core avatar and level meter sockets.
Kept XP/proof/cleared/gate signals visible as compact cells.
Compressed the bot identity row and hid deeper next-action copy, arena, and control matrix on narrow Command Cockpit screens.
Recorded a regression test for the mobile HUD strip behavior.
